country.name: Japan
country.buy: beautifully wrapped regional sweets, craft and stationery
country.chinese_buy: 精美包装的地区甜点、工艺品与文具
country.tip: Japan excels at omiyage: look for sealed, shareable boxes and keep fragile crafts in hand luggage.
country.chinese_tip: 日本的伴手礼文化非常成熟：选择密封、方便分享的礼盒，易碎工艺品请随身携带。
country.shopping_location: Tokyo Station, department-store basements, Don Quijote, Hands and major airports.

products.name: Furoshiki wrapping cloth
products.note: Choose cotton for a practical everyday wrap.
products.description: A patterned square cloth used in Japan for wrapping gifts and carrying items.
products.why_buy: It is a lightweight, reusable alternative to a conventional souvenir bag.
products.typical_overseas_price: Often marked up overseas or unavailable outside Japan.
products.savings: Buy in Japan for regional editions, freshness and wider selection.
products.best_shops: Kyoto craft stores, Hands, LOFT and museum shops.

reviews.body: A beautifully packaged Japanese pick that was easy to take home and share.

products.name: Gachapon capsule toy
products.note: Keep the paper insert with the toy.
products.description: A surprise collectible from Japan’s ubiquitous capsule-toy machines.
products.why_buy: It is the cheapest and most playful way to bring home Japanese pop culture.
products.typical_overseas_price: Often marked up overseas or unavailable outside Japan.
products.savings: Buy in Japan for regional editions, freshness and wider selection.
products.best_shops: Akihabara, station arcades, malls and Don Quijote.

reviews.body: A beautifully packaged Japanese pick that was easy to take home and share.

products.name: Hario V60 ceramic dripper
products.note: Carry ceramic versions in hand luggage.

products.name: Kokeshi wooden doll
products.note: Wrap carefully and carry fragile pieces onboard.

products.name: Maneki-neko lucky cat figurine
products.note: Choose a small ceramic size for safer packing.
